name: FlowcertaValidate
description: Validate RPA workflow files for governance and compliance

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.label: API Key
inputs.helpMarkDown: Flowcerta API key. Store as a pipeline secret variable.

inputs.name: files
inputs.label: Workflow Files
inputs.helpMarkDown: Glob pattern or path to workflow files. Example: $(Build.SourcesDirectory)/workflows/*.xaml

inputs.name: policyPackSlug
inputs.label: Policy Pack Slug
inputs.helpMarkDown: Policy pack slug (e.g. "soc2-prod") to enforce. Leave blank to use the org default.
